getdown.config.title: Get Down! Configurations
getdown.config.general.guide_radius.tool: Radius of the landing prediction ring (blocks)
getdown.config.general.show_void_x.toolt: Shows an X marker when the predicted landing spot is a Structure Void block
getdown.config.color.far_color.tooltip: Ring color when the landing point is far away
getdown.config.color.near_color.tooltip: Ring color when landing is imminent
getdown.config.color.transition_distance: Distance (blocks) at which the ring begins transitioning from Far to Near color
getdown.config.hud.show_damage.tooltip: Displays the estimated fall damage on screen. Hidden in Creative and Spectator mode.
getdown.config.rings.show.tooltip: Renders additional rings at regular intervals above the landing point
getdown.config.rings.spacing.tooltip: Vertical spacing between each layer ring (blocks)
getdown.config.rings.max_count.tooltip: Maximum number of layer rings to display
getdown.config.physics.vehicle_physics.t: Uses accurate drag and gravity values per vehicle type (horse, boat, minecart) for better landing prediction. Disable to use a universal approximation.
getdown.config.effect.particle.tooltip: Particle effect that bursts on landing
getdown.config.effect.volume.tooltip: Volume of the landing sound effect
